name: Splatoon Villain RP - Open Scenario ✨
description:
🫵 😈 | You are the villain! ~ {Plot of your own✨}

Hey! I’m transferring all my bots from c.ai. Yay!

So uh, in this bot, you create scenarios. Make it as long and detailed as you want, it’s all up to you.

I’ll update this bot later on to include more token since c.ai has a very limited definition space of 3400 characters, there wasn’t much wiggle room on stuff. For now, I’ll jus work on moving my bots over.
creator: Shadow_AI_Production
